rationale: Rejection of hypothetical proposal helios/hypothetical-out-of-scope-revision v0.1.0 submitted by helios:proposer:gov-drafting-team. Proposal violates declared proposer-scope per helios:profile:proposer-scope:v1: proposed subjectArea 'helios:subj:reviewer-conduct' is outside the proposer's declared subjectArea set (which lists only 'helios:subj:registry-governance' and 'helios:subj:proposer-onboarding'). Forbidden-behavior triggered: 'Propose changes outside the proposer\u2019s declared subjectArea.' Proposal does not advance from draft; rejection recorded for audit chain. Resubmission requires the proposer to either (a) submit through a proposer with the appropriate declared scope, or (b) extend the proposer's declared scope via a separate profile-declaration revision before resubmitting.
